title: Chain-D1 positioning unwind: (HYPE,ETH) break + HYPE funding extreme
claim: Correlation break between HYPE and ETH (rho=0.025, break_score=0.171) is linked via KG path to an extreme long funding rate on HYPE (z=0.00). title: Chain-D1 flow continuation: (HYPE,BTC) break driven by HYPE burst aggression
claim: Correlation break between HYPE and BTC (rho=0.097, break_score=0.203) is anchored via KG path to a strong_buy burst on HYPE (buy_ratio=1.00).
